examples.title: Algorithm: Constructing an Adjacency Matrix
examples.description: Constructing an adjacency matrix from a simple network diagram
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ConstructAdjacencyMatrix
INPUT: Network diagram with nodes and edges
OUTPUT: Adjacency matrix A

BEGIN
  Initialize matrix A with zeros
  FOR each edge in the network diagram
    Set A_ij = 1 if an edge exists between nodes i and j
  END FOR
  RETURN matrix A
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step construction of an adjacency matrix from a network diagram

examples.title: Python: Constructing an Adjacency Matrix
examples.description: Constructing an adjacency matrix from a simple network diagram using Python
examples.code:
def construct_adjacency_matrix(network_diagram):
  num_nodes = len(network_diagram['nodes'])
  adjacency_matrix = [[0 for _ in range(num_nodes)] for _ in range(num_nodes)]
  for edge in network_diagram['edges']:
    i = edge['source']
    j = edge['target']
    adjacency_matrix[i][j] = 1
    adjacency_matrix[j][i] = 1  # for undirected networks
  return adjacency_matrix

network_diagram = {
  'nodes': [0, 1, 2],
  'edges': [{'source': 0, 'target': 1}, {'source': 1, 'target': 2}]
}
adjacency_matrix = construct_adjacency_matrix(network_diagram)
print(adjacency_matrix)
examples.explanation: Python implementation of constructing an adjacency matrix from a network diagram
